title: Senior React Developer
description: Fable Commerce is a fast-growing e-commerce platform with 300k monthly shoppers. We're rebuilding our frontend from scratch using Next.js and TypeScript. You'll be the second frontend engineer and have huge influence over our architecture and component system.
responsibilities: Lead frontend architecture for new Next.js platform
Integrate GraphQL API and establish data-fetching patterns
Own Core Web Vitals and performance budget
